titleStmt.title: SII 15.107: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 107. (B.K. No. 65 of 1926-27.) YALI-SIRŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into a wall of the Bhōgēśvara temple.
This is dated the 12th regnal year of the king, Sarvajit, Āśvayuja śu. paurṇimā, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1167 A.D., September 30. The weekday however, was Saturday.
It records a gift of garden to the god Bhōgēśvara by Mahāprabhu Dāsirājayya, the Ūroḍeya of Soraṭūru, after washing the feet of Kēdāraśakti-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Engraved in continuation of No. 25 above.
div.p:
© śrī
kāṁtākāṁtanatyuddhata danuja baḷābhīḷa nīḷābhrajāḷō
grākārōccaṇḍa jhaṁjhūniḷanamarakaṁdaṁbaṁ sphuraṁnūtna ratna
byākīrṇnamāḷa mauḷidvijatatinuta pādābja nirakkaṟindaṁ lō
kēśaṁ kēśavaṁ māḷkabhimataphaḷamaṁ dāsirājaṁge niccaṁ
Intenisida śrīmanumahāprabhu soraṭūra vūraḍeya dā
sirājayyagaḷu dharmmacittarāgi © svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuryya
kuḷabhujabaḷa cakravartti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadē
vavarṣada 12 neya sarvvajitu saṁvatsarada Āśvayuja
suddha paurṇamāsye Ādivāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu bhō
gēśvara dēvara Aṁgabhōga nivēdyakke dēvara tōṭada teṁkaṇa maggu
lalarevattalu tōṭavanalliya sthānācāryarappa kē
dāraśaktipaṇḍitadēvargge dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi kālu
karcci kayi dhāreyāgi koṭṭaru . I dharmmamaṁ pratipā
ḷisidavaru vāraṇāsiyoḷu sahasrakavileya kōḍuṁ
koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷu kaṭṭisi mahādvijarggubhayamu
khiyaṁ koṭṭa puṇyada phalamakku . boppaboppa seems to be in later characters.
Digital edition of SII 15.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
